login.title: Welcome Back
login.description: Sign in to your OpenCLI self-hosted account

register.title: Welcome to OpenCLI
register.description: Set up your account to get started
register.footer: This is a single-user system. Only one account can be created.
register.hint: At least 3 characters for username, 6 for password.

errors.usernameTooShort: Username must be at least 3 characters long.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters long.

logout.title: Sign Out
logout.confirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?
